nameMeanings.name: Ingegard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from the name of the fertility god Ing + garðr ‘enclosure, stronghold’.

variants.name: Ingegärd
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from the name of the fertility god Ing + garðr ‘enclosure, stronghold’.

en.lifeSummary: Ingegard Johansdotter was born as the daughter of Johan Magnusson and Mrs. Magnusson. She married Henrik -Hartvigsen- Reventlow about 1348. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.
